Pre-Launch Ads - B2B

39 B2B ad variants for property managers and hospitality operators across 8 categories including problem/agitation, solution/benefit, social proof, and launch countdown

Pre-Launch Ad Campaign: HeyZack B2B

Generated for: Property Managers & Hospitality Operators
Voice: Data-driven, Professional, ROI-focused (The Helpful Peer)
Total Variants: 39 ads across 8 categories
Campaign Goal: Drive pre-launch awareness, email signups, and early-bird commitment

Category 1: Problem/Agitation (5 ads)

Ad #1: The Vendor Hostage Situation

Headline: Still Paying $85K Per Building for “Smart” Systems?

Body Copy:
Traditional BMS vendors quoted you $85K for installation. Then held you hostage with $15K annual “support” fees. Every change requires a $3K service call. You’re managing 20+ properties with fragmented systems that don’t talk to each other.

There’s a better way. Portfolio-scale building automation at 95% lower cost. One dashboard. Every property. Complete control.

CTA: Get Early Access Pricing →

Image Description:
Split-screen comparison: Left side shows frustrated property manager at desk with multiple laptops/tablets (representing fragmented systems), stressed expression, cluttered workspace. Right side shows same person relaxed, single tablet showing unified dashboard with building thumbnails, coffee in hand, organized desk. Clean, professional photography style.

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Property Managers, 35-55, managing 10+ properties

Ad #2: The 2 AM Emergency Call

Headline: Another 2 AM Call: “The Heating’s Not Working”

Body Copy:
It’s 11 PM. You’re finally asleep. Phone rings: “Building C is freezing, tenants are complaining.” You can’t adjust the thermostat remotely. Can’t see system status. You’re driving across town at midnight.

What if AI detected the issue before tenants complained? What if you could fix it from your phone in 90 seconds?

Portfolio operators are cutting after-hours emergencies by 70% with predictive building automation.

CTA: See How It Works →

Image Description:
Dark bedroom scene, smartphone screen illuminating concerned person’s face showing “Building C HVAC Alert - Compressor Issue Detected” notification. Contrast with smaller inset showing phone dashboard with remote thermostat control being adjusted. Moody, relatable nighttime photography.

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Property Managers, Facility Directors experiencing operational stress

Ad #3: The Energy Bill Shock

Headline: $47K in Wasted Energy Last Quarter. Here’s Why.

Body Copy:
Heating empty units. Cooling vacant spaces. HVAC running at full blast while properties sit unoccupied. No visibility into which buildings are bleeding costs.

You know energy is your second-highest expense. But without real-time data and automated optimization, you’re flying blind.

Property managers like you are saving 20-30% on utilities by letting AI handle energy optimization across their entire portfolio.

CTA: Calculate Your Savings →

Image Description:
Infographic-style visual showing building outlines with red “heat map” zones indicating energy waste, with dollar signs floating up like smoke. Contrast section showing same buildings in cool blue with downward-trending cost graph. Clean data visualization aesthetic.

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Cost-conscious property managers, budget decision-makers

Ad #4: The Scaling Nightmare

Headline: You Grew from 15 Properties to 40. Your Stress Grew 10x.

Body Copy:
Every new building means another system to learn. Another vendor relationship. Another app to juggle. Your portfolio doubled, but your operational complexity exploded exponentially.

You can’t hire a facility manager for every building. You need systems that scale without adding headcount.

Top-performing property operators manage 50+ buildings as easily as competitors manage 20. Here’s their secret.

CTA: Learn Their Strategy →

Image Description:
Visual progression: Small cluster of 3-4 building icons with one calm manager figure, arrow pointing to large cluster of 15+ buildings with multiple stressed manager figures running around chaotically. Then arrow to clean single dashboard interface controlling all buildings with one relaxed manager. Modern illustration style.

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Growing property management companies, multi-property operators

Ad #5: The Guest Experience Gamble (Hospitality)

Headline: “Room Was Too Cold” — There Goes Your 5-Star Rating

Body Copy:
Guest checks out. Leaves the AC running at 62°F all day. You’re air conditioning an empty room for 8 hours, burning $15 in utilities. Next guest arrives to a freezing room. One-star review: “Climate control was terrible.”

You lose either way: waste energy or risk bad reviews.

Boutique hotels are solving this with guest-triggered automation that optimizes comfort and costs. Check-in triggers pre-conditioning. Checkout triggers energy savings. Guests are delighted. Owners see 35% lower utility bills.

CTA: See Hotel Case Study →

Image Description:
Split outcome visual: Left shows guest leaving negative review on phone with cold room in background (thermostat visible showing 62°F). Right shows happy guest in perfectly comfortable room, with subtle overlay of automated dashboard showing “Room optimized - $4.50 saved today.” Professional hotel photography style.

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Hospitality operators, boutique hotel managers, Airbnb portfolios

Category 2: Solution/Benefit (5 ads)

Ad #6: One Dashboard, Unlimited Properties

Headline: What If You Could See All 30 Buildings from One Screen?

Body Copy:
Real-time energy usage. Climate status. Occupancy data. Security alerts. All properties, one unified dashboard.

Adjust any thermostat from your phone during owner meetings. Get predictive alerts before systems fail. Generate ROI reports with one click.

HeyZack delivers portfolio-scale automation at consumer prices. $5K per building (not $85K). DIY installation. No service contracts. No vendor lock-in.

Property managers are onboarding new acquisitions in 2 hours, not 2 months.

CTA: Request Demo Access →

Image Description:
Tablet or laptop screen showcasing clean, modern dashboard interface with grid of building thumbnails, each showing key metrics (temperature, energy usage, status indicators). Professional person in business casual reviewing dashboard with coffee, office environment. Screen should be clearly readable with real data visualization.

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Property Managers actively managing portfolios

Ad #7: AI That Actually Learns

Headline: Stop Programming Schedules. Let AI Learn Your Buildings.

Body Copy:
Traditional systems require you to program every scenario. “If Monday 6 AM, then heat to 70°F.” When patterns change, you manually reprogram everything.

HeyZack’s AI learns actual occupancy patterns. Detects seasonal shifts. Predicts optimal heating/cooling windows. Energy savings improve automatically over time: 15% month one → 22% month three → 28% month six.

No rules to write. No schedules to maintain. Just measurable savings that prove themselves.

CTA: See AI in Action →

Image Description:
Abstract visualization showing building with neural network overlay (connected nodes/patterns) learning patterns. Time-lapse effect showing season changes, with efficiency percentage increasing visibly (15% → 22% → 28%). Modern tech aesthetic with subtle animations suggested through motion blur.

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Tech-forward property managers, data-driven decision makers

Ad #8: The 95% Cost Reduction

Headline: $85K or $5K? Same Building Automation, 95% Lower Price.

Body Copy:
Traditional BMS: $85,000 installation + $15,000/year maintenance
HeyZack: $5,000 installation + $0/year maintenance

Same portfolio-scale centralized control. Same energy optimization. Same commercial-grade reliability. No vendor lock-in. No service contracts. DIY installation.

The math is simple. The ROI is proven. Property operators are cutting building automation costs by 95% while improving performance.

Your ownership will ask why you didn’t switch sooner.

CTA: Calculate Your ROI →

Image Description:
Bold comparison graphic: Left side shows “$85,000” in large red text with chains/lock icon. Right side shows “$5,000” in large green text with unlocked/free icon. Background shows professional building manager presenting cost comparison chart to executives in modern office. Clean, high-contrast design.

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Budget-conscious property managers, CFOs, ownership groups

Ad #9: Zero-Touch Guest Operations (Hospitality)

Headline: From Booking to Checkout: 100% Automated

Body Copy:
Guest books. Access code auto-sent 24 hours before arrival. Room pre-cools 30 minutes before check-in. Guest arrives, code works instantly, climate is perfect. Guest checks out. System detects departure, powers down HVAC, resets for turnover.

Zero staff intervention. Zero manual coordination. Zero guest complaints.

Boutique hotels and vacation rental operators are delivering 5-star experiences without 5-star staffing costs. Remote management across 12+ properties from one mobile app.

CTA: Watch 2-Min Demo →

Image Description:
Timeline infographic showing guest journey: Booking (calendar icon) → Auto Code (phone receiving text) → Room Ready (thermostat adjusting) → Perfect Stay (happy guest) → Auto Checkout (system powering down). Clean, modern illustration with hospitality aesthetic. Include subtle “0 manual steps” badge.

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Hospitality operators, Airbnb hosts, boutique hotel managers

Ad #10: Prove ROI to Ownership

Headline: Walk Into Quarterly Reviews with This Dashboard

Body Copy:
“We saved $47,000 in Q3 through automated HVAC optimization. Tenant comfort complaints dropped 65%. Renewal rates increased 12%.”

No estimates. No projections. Actual measured results. Real-time ROI tracking across your entire portfolio. Energy analytics per building, per unit, per device. Transparent proof of operational efficiency.

Finally, data that makes ownership smile during budget meetings.

CTA: See Sample ROI Report →

Image Description:
Professional property manager presenting dashboard on large screen to impressed executives in conference room. Screen shows clear ROI metrics: “$47K Saved Q3”, “65% Fewer Complaints”, “12% Higher Renewals” with upward trending graphs. Confident presenter, attentive audience, modern corporate setting.

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Property managers reporting to ownership, asset managers, portfolio directors

Category 3: Social Proof (5 ads)

Ad #11: Portfolio Patricia Case Study

Headline: How Patricia Cut Operating Costs 28% Across 30 Buildings

Body Copy:
Patricia manages 30 multi-family buildings across three cities. She was drowning in vendor relationships, fragmented systems, and 2 AM emergency calls.

6 months with HeyZack:
✓ Operating costs down 28%
✓ After-hours emergencies down 70%
✓ Onboarded 8 new properties in 2 hours each
✓ Tenant satisfaction scores up 19%

“I manage 40 buildings now as easily as I managed 15 before. HeyZack gave me my life back while impressing ownership.”

CTA: Read Full Case Study →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Property managers seeking validation, peer success stories

Ad #12: Boutique Hotel Energy Savings

Headline: 35% Lower Utility Bills. 4.7-Star Reviews. Same Staff.

Body Copy:
Hugo runs 5 boutique hotels (78 rooms total). Energy costs were killing margins. Guest reviews complained about temperature inconsistency.

3 months with HeyZack:
✓ Utility bills down 35% ($18K annual savings)
✓ Review scores jumped from 4.2 to 4.7 stars
✓ Zero climate-related guest complaints
✓ Remote management across all properties

“Guests think we upgraded to luxury HVAC. We just made our existing systems intelligent.”

CTA: See Hotel Results →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Hospitality operators, hotel owners, vacation rental managers

Ad #13: Industry Expert Endorsement

Headline: “This Is What Smart Building Tech Should Have Been All Along”

Body Copy:
“I’ve tested every building automation platform on the market. Most overpromise and underdeliver. HeyZack actually works.

The AI genuinely learns patterns. The portfolio dashboard is what property managers have been begging for. And the economics make sense: 95% cost reduction vs. traditional BMS without sacrificing capability.

I’m recommending this to every operator I advise.”

— Marcus Chen, Facilities Management Consultant, 20+ years experience

CTA: Explore the Platform →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Skeptical property managers seeking expert validation

Ad #14: Numbers That Matter

Headline: 487 Property Operators. $2.3M in Proven Savings.

Body Copy:
Real data from actual HeyZack deployments:

→ 487 property operators across 12 states
→ 8,400+ buildings under management
→ $2.3M in documented energy savings (last 12 months)
→ 23% average cost reduction per property
→ 4.8/5.0 operator satisfaction rating
→ 92% would recommend to peers

This isn’t marketing theory. This is proven performance from operators just like you.

CTA: Join Early Access List →

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Data-driven decision makers, analytical property managers

Ad #15: From Skeptic to Advocate

Headline: “I Didn’t Believe It Either. Then I Tried It.”

Body Copy:
“I’ve been burned by ‘smart building’ vendors before. $120K invested in a BMS system that required constant service calls and never delivered promised savings. I was skeptical of HeyZack’s claims.

But the 30-day trial was zero risk. Installed it in one building. Energy costs dropped 19% the first month. Deployed across my entire portfolio within 90 days.

6 months later: $34K saved, zero vendor service calls, and I sleep through the night. I was wrong to doubt it.”

— Rachel M., Property Manager, 18-building portfolio

CTA: Start Risk-Free Trial →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Skeptical prospects, those burned by previous vendors

Category 4: Feature Focus (5 ads)

Ad #16: Portfolio Dashboard Deep Dive

Headline: Every Building. Every System. One Screen.

Body Copy:
See what’s happening across your entire portfolio in real-time:

→ Live energy consumption per building
→ Climate status across all units
→ Occupancy detection and patterns
→ Predictive maintenance alerts
→ Cost savings tracking (daily/weekly/monthly)
→ System health monitoring

Drill down into individual buildings, floors, or units. Adjust anything remotely. Export data for owner reports. All from your phone or laptop.

CTA: Explore Dashboard Features →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Detail-oriented property managers, operations directors

Ad #17: Predictive Maintenance Intelligence

Headline: Fix Problems Before Tenants Notice

Body Copy:
HeyZack detects anomalies that signal upcoming failures:

→ HVAC cycling 40% more frequently than baseline? Compressor issue likely.
→ Energy consumption spiking in Building M? System inefficiency detected.
→ Temperature fluctuations in Unit 4B? Sensor or equipment problem.

Get alerts with recommended actions. Schedule preventive maintenance. Avoid $12K emergency replacements and angry tenant calls.

CTA: See Detection Examples →

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Maintenance-focused property managers, facility directors

Ad #18: Remote Climate Control

Headline: Adjust Any Thermostat from Anywhere in 30 Seconds

Body Copy:
Tenant calls: “It’s too hot in here.” You’re 40 miles away at another property. No problem.

Open HeyZack app → Select building → Select unit → See current temp (78°F) → Adjust to 74°F → Confirm with tenant → Problem solved.

Total time: 90 seconds. No truck roll. No emergency HVAC tech at $200/hour. Just instant remote control across your entire portfolio.

CTA: Watch Remote Control Demo →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Property managers handling tenant requests, multi-site operators

Ad #19: Energy Analytics Breakdown

Headline: See Exactly Where Every Dollar of Energy Goes

Body Copy:
Stop guessing. Start knowing.

→ Per-building consumption tracking
→ Per-unit energy breakdowns
→ Device-level power monitoring
→ Historical trend analysis
→ Peer building comparisons
→ ROI calculation per optimization

“Building F uses 31% more energy than comparable properties. Here’s why: HVAC system running inefficiently. Estimated repair cost: $800. Annual savings after fix: $3,400.”

CTA: Explore Analytics Platform →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Data-driven property managers, CFOs, energy-conscious operators

Ad #20: Guest Automation Workflow (Hospitality)

Headline: Guest Experience, Fully Automated

Body Copy:
Booking confirmed:
→ Access code generated automatically
→ Code sent 24 hours before arrival
→ Room pre-conditioned 30 minutes before check-in

Guest arrives:
→ Code works instantly (no front desk needed)
→ Climate is perfect
→ Welcome lighting scene activated

Guest departs:
→ System detects checkout via door lock
→ HVAC powers down
→ Room enters turnover mode for cleaning

CTA: See Full Automation →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Hospitality operators, vacation rental managers, hotel owners

Category 5: Objection Handling (5 ads)

Ad #21: “Too Good to Be True?”

Headline: We Know. You’ve Heard These Promises Before.

Body Copy:
Every BMS vendor claims their system will “revolutionize operations” and “deliver massive savings.” Then you pay $85K and get disappointing results.

We get your skepticism. That’s why we offer:

✓ 30-day money-back guarantee
✓ Pilot program (deploy in 1-2 buildings first)
✓ ROI guarantee: If you don’t see 15% energy savings in 90 days, full refund
✓ Zero contract lock-in

CTA: Start Risk-Free Pilot →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Skeptical prospects, those burned by previous vendors

Ad #22: “DIY = Unreliable?”

Headline: DIY Installation. Enterprise Reliability.

Body Copy:
“DIY sounds unprofessional. Won’t my ownership think it’s a jury-rigged system?”

Fair question. Here’s reality:

→ Commercial-grade components (IP65, -20°C to 60°C operation)
→ Bank-level encryption security
→ 99.7% uptime SLA available
→ Enterprise support tier with 4-hour response
→ Matter protocol certified

DIY refers to installation (no $50K labor fees), not reliability.

CTA: Review Technical Specs →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Decision makers concerned about credibility, enterprise-minded managers

Ad #23: “What If You Go Out of Business?”

Headline: Your System Works Even If We Disappear

Body Copy:
Valid concern. Many property managers got burned when Wink, Insteon, and other smart home companies shut down.

HeyZack’s architecture protects you:

→ Local control functionality (works without our servers)
→ Open protocols (Zigbee, Matter, WiFi standard)
→ Data export tools (your data, your control)
→ Device compatibility with other platforms

If we go under, your system continues operating locally.

CTA: Read Continuity Plan →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Risk-averse property managers, long-term investment thinkers

Ad #24: “Our Buildings Are Too Old/Complex”

Headline: “We’ve Deployed in 1970s Buildings. Yours Will Work.”

Body Copy:
“My buildings are 40+ years old with no smart infrastructure. This won’t work here.”

We’ve heard this before. Then we deployed in:

→ 1972 apartment building (Cincinnati) — 19% energy savings
→ 1965 office complex (Detroit) — Fully operational in 6 days
→ Historic hotel (Charleston) — No wall demolition required

Retrofit-friendly design means no rewiring, no construction permits, no tenant disruption.

CTA: Schedule Assessment Call →

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Operators of older buildings, retrofit-cautious managers

Ad #25: “I’m Not Technical Enough”

Headline: If You Can Use Your Smartphone, You Can Run This

Body Copy:
“I’m not a tech person. This seems overwhelming.”

You don’t need to be an engineer:

→ Setup: Scan QR code, follow app prompts (30 minutes)
→ Daily use: Tap building → Tap unit → Adjust setting
→ Reporting: Click “Generate Report” → Email to ownership

Our oldest user is 67. She manages 12 buildings solo using HeyZack.

CTA: Watch 5-Min Setup Video →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Less tech-savvy property managers, older demographic

Category 6: Comparison (5 ads)

Ad #26: HeyZack vs. Traditional BMS

Headline: Same Control. 95% Lower Cost.

Body Copy:
Traditional BMS (Honeywell, Johnson Controls):
✗ $50K-$85K installation per building
✗ $15K/year mandatory maintenance
✗ 3-6 month deployment timeline
✗ Vendor lock-in & service contracts

HeyZack:
✓ $2K-$8K installation per building
✓ $0/year mandatory fees
✓ 2-hour deployment per building
✓ DIY control, no contracts

CTA: Compare Full Features →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Property managers researching alternatives to traditional BMS

Ad #27: HeyZack vs. Consumer Smart Home

Headline: Enterprise Features at Consumer Prices

Body Copy:
Consumer Products (Nest, Ring, SmartThings):
✗ 7+ different apps to manage
✗ No portfolio-scale control
✗ Tenants can factory reset devices
✗ Consumer-grade support

HeyZack:
✓ One unified platform
✓ Unlimited property management
✓ Tamper alerts & remote recovery
✓ Commercial SLA support

CTA: See Enterprise Features →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Property managers currently using fragmented consumer solutions

Ad #28: Before HeyZack vs. After

Headline: Your Operations: Before and After

Body Copy:
BEFORE:
→ Juggling 7 different apps
→ 2 AM emergency calls weekly
→ $47K quarterly energy bills
→ Tenant complaints about comfort

AFTER:
→ One unified dashboard
→ Predictive alerts (no surprises)
→ $33K quarterly energy bills (30% ↓)
→ 65% fewer comfort complaints

CTA: See Transformation Stories →

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Property managers experiencing operational overwhelm

Ad #29: Fragmented vs. Unified

Headline: 7 Systems or 1 Platform. Your Choice.

Body Copy:
The Fragmented Approach:
Honeywell for HVAC + Ring for security + Ecobee for thermostats + SimpliSafe for alarms + Sense for energy monitoring + Nest for some units

= 7 logins, 7 apps, 7 vendor relationships, zero integration

The HeyZack Approach:
One platform. Every system. Complete control.

CTA: See Integration Map →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Operations directors, tech-stack decision makers

Ad #30: Manual vs. Automated

Headline: Stop Managing. Start Optimizing.

Body Copy:
Manual Property Management:
→ Check each building’s systems daily
→ Respond to tenant calls reactively
→ Schedule HVAC changes building-by-building

Automated with HeyZack:
→ Dashboard shows all buildings at a glance
→ AI alerts you before problems escalate
→ Portfolio-wide optimization runs automatically

Same responsibility. 80% less administrative burden.

CTA: Experience Automation →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Time-strapped property managers, operational efficiency seekers

Category 7: Launch Countdown (5 ads)

Ad #31: 30 Days Until Launch

Headline: 30 Days Until HeyZack Goes Live

Body Copy:
The platform property managers have been waiting for launches in 30 days.

Early access list members get:
→ 40% discount on first building deployment
→ Priority onboarding (skip the waitlist)
→ Lifetime price lock (no future increases)

Limited to first 200 operators. 143 spots remaining.

CTA: Secure Early Access →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Interested prospects, email subscribers, warm leads

Ad #32: 14 Days - Feature Reveal

Headline: Launch in 14 Days: Here’s What You’re Getting

Body Copy:
2 weeks until launch. Here’s the complete platform:

✓ Portfolio Dashboard (unlimited properties)
✓ AI Energy Optimization (20-30% savings)
✓ Predictive Maintenance Alerts
✓ Remote Climate Control
✓ Real-Time ROI Tracking

Early access pricing expires at launch. Lock in 40% discount before public release.

CTA: Reserve Your Spot →

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Consideration-stage prospects, feature-focused buyers

Ad #33: 7 Days - Testimonial Preview

Headline: 7 Days Until Launch. Beta Users Are Impressed.

Body Copy:
“I’ve tested HeyZack in beta for 90 days across 12 of my buildings. Energy costs dropped 24%. The predictive maintenance alerts saved me from a $15K HVAC disaster.”

— Sarah K., Property Manager, 28-building portfolio

CTA: Get Early Access Now →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Social proof-driven prospects, testimonial responders

Ad #34: 48 Hours - Final Call

Headline: 48 Hours Until Launch. Last Chance for Early Pricing.

Body Copy:
Early access benefits expire at launch:
✗ 40% discount ends
✗ Lifetime price lock closes
✗ Priority onboarding waitlist activates

29 early access spots remain. First-come, first-served.

CTA: Claim Your Spot NOW →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Procrastinators, fence-sitters, final decision stage

Ad #35: We’re Live!

Headline: HeyZack Is Now Live. Start Your Pilot Today.

Body Copy:
After 18 months of development and 90 days of beta testing with 200+ property operators, HeyZack is officially launched.

Portfolio-scale building automation. 95% cost reduction. AI-driven optimization. Zero vendor lock-in.

CTA: Start Your Pilot →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: All audiences, broad announcement

Category 8: Early Bird Urgency (4 ads)

Ad #36: Limited Onboarding Capacity

Headline: We Can Only Onboard 50 Properties This Quarter

Body Copy:
To ensure every property operator succeeds, we’re limiting Q1 onboarding to 50 properties.

31 Q1 slots filled. 19 remaining. Apply by Friday.

CTA: Apply for Q1 Slot →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Quality-focused buyers, those who value support

Ad #37: Price Increase Warning

Headline: Introductory Pricing Ends March 15th

Body Copy:
Current (Until March 15): $2,995 per building + $0/year
After March 15: $4,995 per building + $0/year

Lock in introductory pricing before March 15. Lifetime price guarantee included.

CTA: Lock in Current Price →

Target Platform: Google Display
Audience Segment: Price-sensitive buyers, deal seekers

Ad #38: Competitor Advantage Warning

Headline: Your Competitors Are Already Deploying

Body Copy:
4 property management companies in your market have already started HeyZack pilots.

In 6 months, they’ll be operating more efficiently than you. You can catch up now, or play defense later.

CTA: Don’t Fall Behind →

Target Platform: LinkedIn
Audience Segment: Competitive-minded operators, market leaders

Ad #39: Lifetime Benefits Closing

Headline: Early Adopters Get Benefits Others Never Will

Body Copy:
Join before March 31st, receive:

✓ Lifetime price lock (never increases)
✓ Early Adopter badge (priority support forever)
✓ Input on roadmap (help shape future features)
✓ Exclusive community access

CTA: Claim Early Adopter Status →

Target Platform: Facebook
Audience Segment: Status-conscious buyers, thought leaders, visibility seekers

Campaign Execution Notes

Platform Strategy:

  • LinkedIn: Professional credibility, ROI focus, peer validation
  • Facebook: Emotional storytelling, hospitality focus, testimonials
  • Google Display: Data-driven, visual analytics, comparison

Audience Segmentation:

  • Property Managers: Majority of ads
  • Hospitality Operators: Ads #5, 9, 12, 20, 39

A/B Testing Recommendations:

  • Test ROI messaging (specific % vs. $ amounts)
  • Test urgency (scarcity vs. price increase)
  • Test social proof (expert vs. peer testimonials)
  • Test objection handling (direct acknowledgment vs. feature focus)
